# Hebrew Text Fixer for Affinity Canvas - Workspace Instructions

## Project Overview
Python GUI application that fixes Hebrew text direction issues for Affinity Canvas 3, which doesn't handle Hebrew correctly.

## Key Requirements
- Fix Hebrew word reversal while preserving word order
- Handle nikud marks correctly
- Support multiple file formats: DOCX, RTF, ODT, TXT
- PyQt5 GUI for Windows
- Preserve document formatting when possible

## Project Setup Checklist

- [x] Create copilot-instructions.md
- [x] Get Python project setup info
- [x] Create main application file
- [x] Create requirements.txt
- [x] Configure Python environment
- [x] Install dependencies
- [x] Create README.md
- [x] Test the application
